{{CargoOrgan
|name=Wandering Sword Heart
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10954
|idx=147
|description=Heart of a master swordsman, steeped in pure blade intent. So sharp it seems to emit sword aura just by looking at it. Radiates overwhelming presence!
|skill=
|hp=1344
|def=128
|atk=224
|rush=145
|gene1=Per Purple+ Gear equipped, {race} ATK +8
|gene2=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30m
|gene3=Per Purple+ Gear equipped, {race} RUSH +8
|gene4=Snail Arena, Chance of cause Bleed +4%
|gene7=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1h 30m (Awakened)
|}}
